mapper.sql: id, template_code, template_name, report_type, version_no, file_id, description, status, is_latest, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO template
template_code, template_name, report_type, version_no, file_id, description, status, is_latest, created_by, updated_by, deleted
#{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{reportType}, #{versionNo}, #{fileId}, #{description}, #{status}, #{latest}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM template WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE template SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE template SET file_id = #{fileId}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
